description: Core individual identification and demographic data
Detailed breakdown of household income sources
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES (
	INCOME_SOURCE_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	UNIQUE_HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT,
	INCOME_FROM_ANIMALS_MARKET_PLUS_HOME_MINUS_COST_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ALL_BUSINESSES_NET_INCOME_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ALL_BUSINESSES_NET_CALCULATED_INCOME_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	INCOME_FROM_PROPERTY_AND_PENSIONS_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ANNUAL_HOUSEHOLD_WAGE_AND_SALARY_EARNINGS_WITH_BONUSES_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ALL_GOVERNMENT_BENEFITS_INCOME_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	REMITTANCES_RECEIVED_FROM_NON_RESIDENTS_LAST_YEAR_RUPEES INTEGER,
	INCOME_NON_AGRICULTURAL_WAGE_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	INCOME_FARM_WAGE_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	INCOME_SALARY_POSITION_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	INCOME_NREGA_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	INDIVIDUAL_OTHER_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION
);

description: Child immunization dates for eligible women's last birth
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_IMMUNIZATION CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_IMMUNIZATION (
	IMMUNIZATION_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	UNIQUE_PERSON_ID BIGINT,
	GOVERNMENT_MONEY_FOR_HOSPITAL_DELIVERY_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	BCG_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	POLIO0_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER BIGINT,
	DPT1_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER BIGINT,
	DPT2_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	DPT3_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	POLIO1_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER BIGINT,
	POLIO2_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER BIGINT,
	POLIO3_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER BIGINT,
	MEASLES_IMMUNIZATION_DATE_INTEGER BIGINT
);

description: Individual labor hours by work category
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_INDIVIDUAL_WORK_HOURS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_INDIVIDUAL_WORK_HOURS (
	WORK_HOURS_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	UNIQUE_PERSON_ID BIGINT,
	TOTAL_WORK_HOURS_PER_YEAR INTEGER,
	FARM_WORK_HOURS_PER_YEAR INTEGER,
	NONFARM_BUSINESS_HOURS_PER_YEAR_ALL_BUSINESSES INTEGER,
	AGRICULTURAL_LABOR_HOURS_PER_YEAR INTEGER,
	NON_AGRICULTURAL_LABOR_HOURS_PER_YEAR INTEGER,
	SALARY_POSITION_HOURS_PER_YEAR INTEGER,
	NON_NREGA_LABOR_HOURS_PER_YEAR INTEGER,
	SPOUSE_TOTAL_WORK_HOURS_PER_YEAR INTEGER
);
